title: MIGRAINE: MRI Graph Reliability Analysis and Inference for Connectomics
abstract: Connectomes can be estimated in humans at ~1mm3 scale using diffusion and functional MRI. We present a scalable implementation of open-source algorithms to rapidly estimate MR connectomes and develop a novel nonparametric non-Euclidean reliability metric.
notes: Macro-scale MRI connectomics pipeline and reliability analysis.
